Compliance.description: SARB PA, FSCA FSP; solid regulatory standing; some fines historically but current compliance good.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.48/5; high complaint volume; iOS 4.7/5; clear disconnect between app ratings and overall satisfaction.

Product Value.description: Competitive offers; CashSend useful; fees average; Absa Rewards offers some value.

Innovation.description: PayShap, Absa Rewards, ChatBanking, digital-first strategy, open banking.

Customer Support.description: Large infrastructure but HelloPeter reflects poor resolution quality.

Accessibility & Security.description: Nationwide; POPIA; incidents of fraud/phishing; face ID/biometric controls in app.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Transact R55/mo; Gold from R90; Premier from R195; Private from R400

socialSentiment.summary: App praised; service complaints dominate community feedback.
